data_coverage_summary: Optum/Change Healthcare APIs has public documentation that indicates revenue-cycle and payment workflows across claims, payments, eligibility checks, authorizations. Change Healthcare API assets now appear under Optum developer portal.
buyer_guidance: Use this surface for healthcare claims, billing, and payment workflow integration rather than patient-device or telemetry use cases. Change Healthcare should be treated as a rest api surface for revenue-cycle and payment workflows.
overview: Public documentation reviewed for Optum/Change Healthcare APIs indicates Change Healthcare API assets now appear under Optum developer portal. The documented surface aligns with revenue-cycle and payment workflows and covers claims, payments, eligibility checks, authorizations. Asset data is Unsupported. Telemetry data is Unsupported. Writeback is Supported.

available_data.description: The public documentation indicates revenue-cycle workflows around claims, eligibility, authorizations, payments, and billing-state exchange.

ingest_considerations: The public source for Optum/Change Healthcare APIs is documentation-oriented, so live access still depends on vendor-issued credentials, tenant configuration, or customer enablement.
This row is modeled as revenue-cycle and payment workflows, so downstream integrations should scope data collection and writeback around those documented business workflows.
No exact public machine-readable JSON or YAML artifact was confirmed during this pass, so the documentation URL remains the primary evidence anchor.

source_evidence.evidence_notes: Change Healthcare API assets now appear under Optum developer portal.
